title: podman run: add -h alias for --hostname
body:
docker allows (and documents) `-h` as a short alias for `--hostname`; podman seems to interpret it as `--help`:
```
# podman run -h foo.example.com fedora uname -n
[usage message]
# echo $?
0

# docker run -h foo.example.com fedora uname -n
foo.example.com
```

comments.body: I think we can tell urfave/cli to not use `-h` for help, and then add it as a short option for `--hostname`
Seems like a bad docker design, but ...
BC we are in agreement, closing
